childhood.familyBackground: Educated family tied to Soviet academic circles. Father was academic administrator.
childhood.education: Leningrad State University, economics and international relations
childhood.educationKo: 레닌그라드 국립 대학, 경제학 및 국제 관계
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in intellectual atmosphere of Leningrad. Studied foreign languages.

careerTimeline.event: Founded investment bank during privatization era
Became advisor to Russian government on economic policy
Focused on wealth management and international finance
careerTimeline.eventKo: 자산 관리 및 국제 금융 집중

failures.lesson: Sovereign risk requires deeper due diligence
failures.lessonKo: 주권 위험은 더 깊은 실사 필요

quotes.text: Understanding Russian culture is key to international cooperation
quotes.textKo: 러시아 문화 이해가 국제 협력의 핵심

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Bridge-building between Russian and international finance
personalTraits.knownForKo: 러시아와 국제 금융 사이의 다리 건설
